## Meeting Purpose

[Demo the current content workflow to inform the new Atlas pipeline build.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Founder Edwin paused content production, calling it "low-quality BPO material." This stemmed from a strategy mismatch between the Search team and its subsidiary, Data Annotation.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new workflow was built around a proprietary knowledge base of Edwin's transcribed interviews, replacing Atlas's generic public scraping to capture his unique perspective.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Method:** Content is generated section-by-section in Claude, as one-shot prompts produce generic output. The workflow is guided by a complex step-by-step prompt template.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Goal:** Replicate this quality-focused workflow in Atlas, using the new knowledge base as the pipeline's "backbone" to produce non-generic content.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Quality Mismatch

  - [**Initial Strategy (2 months ago):** A high-volume (30 articles/week), SEO-focused strategy was set with the Data Annotation team, using Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [**Founder Feedback:** Edwin paused production, calling the content "low-quality BPO material" that was generic and lacked his unique perspective.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A strategy mismatch between the Data Annotation team (focused on volume) and the Search team (focused on quality and founder voice).](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

### The Solution: Proprietary Knowledge Base

  - [**Core Insight:** The key to unique content is a unique source of truth.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**New Knowledge Base:** Transcribed interviews (4-5 videos) and company docs (audience, guidelines) were loaded into a Claude project.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [**Function:** This proprietary data now serves as the "backbone" for all content generation, ensuring it reflects Edwin's specific frameworks and language.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)

### The Method: Section-by-Section Generation

  - [**Process:** A complex, step-by-step prompt template guides the generation in Claude.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This section-by-section approach is critical because one-shot prompts consistently produce generic or "gibberish" content.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Validation:** Each section is reviewed for quality and ICP alignment before proceeding.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)

### Future Enhancements (Post-Quality Fix)

  - [**Automated Webflow Publishing:** Automate the current 20-minute manual publishing process for the main blog collection.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [**Automated Image Generation:** Automate the manual creation of in-article and featured images.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [**Content-Type Templates:** Create distinct templates for guides, listicles, and comparison articles, similar to the "augment code" client's system.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tamy:** Generate a sample article using the new Atlas pipeline and the proprietary knowledge base.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [**Ismail:** Review the sample and provide specific feedback to refine the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [**Ismail:** Share the content brief table for the sample article with Tamy.](https://fathom.video/share/GGBs5x1ggY6v3zhrm5-mL9Msp2xb-yhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
